title: Landing page renders and CTA is visible
description: Verify the landing page loads and the primary call-to-action is present.
steps: Navigate to /
Verify the main heading is visible
Verify the Open Dashboard CTA is visible

title: Login page renders with form controls
description: Verify the login page loads and the auth form fields are visible.
steps: Navigate to /login
Verify email input is visible
Verify password input is visible
Verify the sign in button is visible

title: Protected dashboard route redirects unauthenticated users
description: Verify the dashboard route redirects to the login page when no auth session is set.
steps: Navigate to /dashboard without auth cookies
Verify the browser is redirected to /login
Verify the login form fields are visible

title: Forgot password page renders
description: Verify the password recovery request page loads.
steps: Navigate to /forgot-password
Verify the recovery email input is visible
Verify the send reset link button is visible

title: Reset password page renders
description: Verify the password reset confirmation page loads.
steps: Navigate to /reset-password
Verify the new password input is visible
Verify the confirm password input is visible

title: Register page renders and shows sign up form
description: Verify the registration page loads and displays the sign up form fields.
steps: Navigate to /register
Verify the name input is visible
Verify the email input is visible
Verify the password input is visible
Verify the create account button is visible
